0110001010010001 0000010001101000 1 -> sum: 0110011011111010, cout: 0
0000111001110011 1111100111011110 1 -> sum: 0000100001010010, cout: 1

0011000011001011 1000111010001010 0 -> sum: 1011111101010101, cout: 0
1011100011001010 0101000111010100 0 -> sum: 0000101010011110, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0

0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
